title: Hydrophobic Elytra
description: With this mod players no longer be able to fly with the Elytra in fluids
body:
Hydrophobic Elytra

Hydrophobic Elytra is a mod that prevents players from flying with the elytra underwater. This function is removed because it is a bit illogical (even though we're talking about Minecraft) and also because it causes several incompatibilities with mods that add new elytras or allow them to be used with other flight methods. An example of this is when combining the Create Jetpack Mod with the Elytra Slot mod.
